underlying_goal: Analyze and root-cause a bug (ENG-1017175) where extracted forensic text in a DLP redaction response loses multiple blank lines and leading spaces
friction_detail: Claude initially attributed the blank-line collapsing to normalization and conflated forensic vs redacted content, requiring user correction.
brief_summary: User wanted root-cause analysis of a text-normalization bug in DLP responses; Claude investigated the codebase and corrected its initial misanalysis but the transcript ends before a definitive root cause is confirmed.
